transcript: Okay, I got a box, but there's no key in here, just letters. That's the wrong box. Put it back. Oh, Sheldon, are these letters from your grandmother? Don't read those letters. Oh, look, she calls you Moon Pie. That is so cute. Put down the letters! Hey, Penny, it's Leonard. Hey, Leonard, how's the train ride? Delightful. Listen, I don't know what you're doing right now but there are little bubbles forming in the corner of sheldon's mouth okay yeah i kind of crossed a line put him back on thank you i'm back what up moon pie no one calls me moon pie but me more hey penny leonard again
